name: @forwardimpact/svcmcp
description: Unified MCP server — agents reach backend services as tools without per-service integration.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Adding a new gRPC service and realizing each one needs its own MCP glue to become an agent tool.
jobs.bigHire: expose every backend service as agent tools through one server.
jobs.littleHire: add a service to the MCP surface without writing integration code.
jobs.competesWith: per-service MCP wrappers; hand-writing tool schemas for each endpoint; leaving services unreachable by agents
